description_langs.en: Stay in our 8 Bed Mixed Dormitory with a shared exterior bathroom & shower facility. Faces directly onto Loch Ness and less than a minute's walk to the beach. You'll get one bed in a bunk bed per person in the reservation - just send us a message if you want to request a bottom bunk! Message us if you are booking for more than 5 people, as we will need to approve your booking.

Stay in our budget twin bunk bed room with an exterior bathroom shared with other guests - you'll get the whole room to yourself containing one bed. Faces directly onto Loch Ness and less than a minute's walk to the beach. Max occupancy is 2 people.

Stay in our budget single bed room with an exterior bathroom shared with other guests - you'll get the whole room to yourself containing one bed. Faces directly onto Loch Ness and less than a minute's walk to the beach. Please note the room is small and has limited room for storage - it is priced accordingly. Max occupancy is just one person.

data.title: Entire Lochside Hostel (for up to 29 people)

title_langs.en: Entire Lochside Hostel (for up to 29 people)

description_langs.en:
Sole use of our entire hostel main building, accommodating up to 29 people of any age - between November and March. We also have an annexe building that sleeps 40 more, please contact us to discuss availability. Otherwise available on a per bed or per room basis. Your group will have private use of every bedroom, bathroom, the kitchen and lounge areas, as well as the car park. Free high speed Starlink WiFi throughout the main building.

A member of staff will be available throughout your stay and during check-in and check-out.  Kayak hire is available via Kayakomat 24/7 during your stay and the hostel's beach is located just 30 metres from the main building. Sorry, pets cannot be accommodated at any time. Looking for space for more than 29 people? Contact us to see if we're able to host your group in alternative accommodation here on Loch Ness.

The building contains on its ground floor:
1x 8 bed dormitory (bunk beds)
1x 4 bed dormitory (bunk beds)
1x twin room (bunk beds)
2x WC and showers
Large lounge area with seating for all guests at any time
Fully equipped kitchen with pots, pans, fridges, stoves, ovens, microwaves, cutlery, plates, bowls

And on its first floor (no elevator or lift access):
3x 4 bed dormitory (bunk beds)
1x twin room (bunk beds)
1x single room (single bed)
2x WC and shower rooms

For any questions on the suitability of our accommodation for your needs, or the facilities available, please reach out to us.
